(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5, b6 (height 2, b5 on table, b6 on top)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b7, b8, b9, b10 (height 4, b7 on table)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )

      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)

      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 inverted (still on table, still height 1)

      (clear b3)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5, b6 (height 2, b5 on table, b6 on b5)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b7, b8, b9, b10 (height 4, b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 still on table (no change, height 1)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 still on table (no change, height 1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 still on table (no change, height 1)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4: b4 still on table (no change, height 1)
      (on-table b4)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b10 on table, b9 on b10, b8 on b9, b7 on b8
      (on-table b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 2 (b2, b3 where b2 on table, b3 on b2)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 2 (b4, b5 where b4 on table, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 4 (b6, b7, b8, b9 where b6 on table)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 6 (b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15 where b10 on table)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)

      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b3, b4, b5 (b5 on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b6, b7, b8, b9, b10, b11 (b11 on top)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b18 on top)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (still height 1)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (still height 1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5, b3 on b4
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, ..., b6 on b7
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b18 on table, b17 on b18, ..., b12 on b13
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b3, b4, b5 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 6): b6, b7, b8, b9, b10, b11 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, ..., b11 on b10)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18 (b12 on table, ..., b18 on b17)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5, b4, b3 becomes b3, b4, b5 (b5 on table, b4 on b5, b3 on b4)
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)

      (on b8 b9)

      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)

      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 9): b3-b11 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, ..., b11 on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 9): b12-b20 (b12 on table, b13 on b12, ..., b20 on top)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, ..., b3 on top

      (clear b12)
    )
  )
)

  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5 on table, b6 on b5 (height 2)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b7 on table, b8 on b7 (height 2)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 7: b9 on table, b10 on b9 (height 2)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 8: b11 on table, b12 on b11 (height 2)
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 9: b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on b14 (height 3)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Tower 10: b16 on table, b17 on b16, b18 on b17, b19 on b18, b20 on b19 (height 5)
    (on-table b16)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 inverted (already on table, so goal satisfied)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 inverted (already on table, so goal satisfied)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 inverted (already on table, so goal satisfied)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4: b4 inverted (already on table, so goal satisfied)
      (on-table b4)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5: b6 on table, b5 on b6 (inverted)
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 6: b8 on table, b7 on b8 (inverted)
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 7: b10 on table, b9 on b10 (inverted)
      (on-table b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Tower 8: b12 on table, b11 on b12 (inverted)
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
